architectReview.evidence: Architecture rerun agent://19-ArchitectureRerun and persisted review stage-16-architect.md found no blockers after final fixes: typed-only ProductImportBlockedError route, no deterministic URL parser fallback, executable optional Naver live smoke, pinned/bounded insane-search worker contract, centralized status transition graph, retention predicates, compliance dismissal audit, export owner-approval gate, Kanban returned-status behavior, and live Playwright surface evidence. AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORT agent://18-SlopCleanupRerun is CLEAR with blocking_findings: 0 and advisory_findings: 0.

executorQa.evidence: Executor QA rerun agent://20-QaEvidenceRerun passed with blockers []. Leader-observed verification after final fixes passed: npm run lint; npm run typecheck; npm test (13 files, 170 passed, 1 skipped optional live Naver); npm run test:e2e (3 real Next app Playwright tests passed); npm run build; git diff --check. The optional live Naver smoke is executable but skipped unless RUN_NAVER_LIVE=1 plus credentials are present.

artifactRefs.description: Final command verification report for all 8 documented gaps.
Real Next app Revenue Desk product import success/fail-closed manual fallback screenshot.
Real Next app Content Factory medium compliance dismissal reason/audit screenshot.
Real Next app HQ Kanban compliance side-effect returned-status screenshot.
Structured Playwright automation transcript for the three real Next app live-surface tests.
Playwright live-surface harness for products, compliance, and HQ Kanban.
Status graph, export owner-approval gate, and retention predicate tests.
Compliance dismissal UI/audit and Kanban returned-status UI contract tests.

contractCoverage.contractRef: Approved gap 1: Naver real-data integration verification
contractCoverage.obligation: Mocked official API integration must pass and live Naver smoke must be executable only behind RUN_NAVER_LIVE plus credentials.

contractCoverage.contractRef: Approved gap 2: product URL crawling/import using fivetaku/insane-search
contractCoverage.obligation: Pinned worker contract must fail closed, validate initial/redirect/final URLs, require metadata, and avoid deterministic URL parser fallback persistence.

contractCoverage.contractRef: Approved gap 3: PackageStatus transition graph validation
contractCoverage.obligation: All PackageStatus values must be covered, illegal transitions reject before DB update/audit, same-status updates are no-op, and normal routes cannot use seed/admin bypass.
Dry-run and execute plans must include raw_items by expiresAt, delete only old completed/failed/blocked agent runs, skip running and recent triggered runs.

contractCoverage.contractRef: Approved gap 5: Compliance medium dismiss reason UI
contractCoverage.obligation: Medium issues require owner reason, low remains one-click with default reason, high remains non-dismissible, and audit metadata survives reload.

contractCoverage.contractRef: Approved gap 6: Kanban status side effects/compliance trigger behavior
contractCoverage.obligation: Dragging to compliance triggers server-side compliance behavior, blocks missing draft/invalid transitions, and renders actual returned status.

contractCoverage.contractRef: Approved gap 7: remaining touched UI detail polish
contractCoverage.obligation: Touched surfaces must show clear fallback/error/disabled copy, labels, and focused UI states for products, compliance, and Kanban.

contractCoverage.contractRef: Approved gap 8: stronger E2E/Storybook or equivalent live-surface verification
contractCoverage.obligation: Real app live-surface tests must cover product import fallback/success, compliance reason/audit, and Kanban side effect with screenshots.

surfaceEvidence.contractRef: Product import success/fail-closed fallback live surface
surfaceEvidence.invocation: Playwright opens /products in the real Next app, uses authenticated session cookie, mocks only API routes, imports a Naver Shopping URL once successfully, retries a blocked import, asserts exact manual fallback copy, and captures artifacts/g001-live-products.jpg.

surfaceEvidence.contractRef: Compliance medium dismissal reason/audit live surface
surfaceEvidence.invocation: Playwright opens /packages/pkg_medium in the real Next app, validates empty medium dismissal reason error, posts owner-entered reason with CSRF assertion, renders audit copy, and captures artifacts/g001-live-compliance.jpg.

surfaceEvidence.contractRef: HQ Kanban compliance side-effect returned status live surface
surfaceEvidence.invocation: Playwright opens / in the real Next app, drags assigned package to the compliance column, asserts PATCH body and CSRF, receives owner_approval_required, renders returned status copy, and captures artifacts/g001-live-kanban.jpg.

Vitest crawler contract tests exercise pinned worker metadata, blocked initial URLs, unsafe redirect/final URLs, omitted redirect_chain, oversized worker response, missing metadata, and crawler-unavailable fail-closed behavior.

surfaceEvidence.contractRef: Naver official API mocked integration and optional live gate
surfaceEvidence.invocation: Vitest P2 tests exercise injectable Naver requester, credential failure, malformed response failure, and an executable live-smoke test skipped unless RUN_NAVER_LIVE=1 plus credentials are present.

Vitest status-retention tests exercise transition matrix coverage, illegal transition rejection before DB/audit writes, same-status no-op, export owner-approval block, and retention dry-run predicates.
Vitest source contract tests verify required medium reason/audit serialization, high/low severity dismissal distinctions, owner approval gating, and Kanban returned-status/error/disabled copy.

adversarialCases.scenario: Automatic import is blocked after a prior successful import attempt.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: UI displays exact manual-registration fallback copy and does not silently create fallback product data.

adversarialCases.scenario: insane-search worker returns null/unavailable for a URL containing query/price-looking data.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: importProduct rejects with PRODUCT_IMPORT_BLOCKED:crawler_unavailable and does not persist.

adversarialCases.scenario: Worker returns metadata and final_url but omits redirect_chain.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Import rejects with PRODUCT_IMPORT_BLOCKED:invalid_response and does not persist.
Import rejects with PRODUCT_IMPORT_BLOCKED:invalid_response and does not persist.

adversarialCases.scenario: Worker omits final_url, changes final_url to a non-allowlisted host, or final URL resolves to a private IP.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Import rejects with final_url_uninspectable, blocked_domain, or private_ip and does not persist.

adversarialCases.scenario: Worker returns allowed final URL but missing/invalid product metadata.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Import rejects with PRODUCT_IMPORT_BLOCKED:metadata_missing and does not persist placeholder data.

adversarialCases.scenario: RUN_NAVER_LIVE is absent or credentials are incomplete.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Live smoke is skipped unless RUN_NAVER_LIVE=1 and both credentials exist; final npm test reports 1 skipped optional live Naver test.

adversarialCases.scenario: Official Naver API returns malformed item URL or credentials are blank/missing.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: NaverApiResponseError or NaverClientConfigurationError is thrown without leaking secrets or silently falling back.

adversarialCases.scenario: User attempts to dismiss a medium compliance issue with no reason, then with an owner-entered reason.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Empty reason is rejected; provided reason is posted, serialized, and displayed in audit metadata.

adversarialCases.scenario: Dragging assigned card into compliance invokes a backend request that returns owner_approval_required rather than requested compliance_checked.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: UI renders returned-status success copy and card shows 승인 필요 in the 검수중 column.

adversarialCases.scenario: Archived package attempts transition to selected or assigned attempts direct approved transition.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Illegal transition rejects before contentPackage.update or statusTransition.create.

adversarialCases.scenario: Package has exportAllowed compliance check but status is owner_approval_required.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: exportContentPackage returns blocked and does not create export rows.

adversarialCases.scenario: Dry-run retention cleanup sees expired raw items plus protected/running/triggered agent runs.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Raw-item and agent-run matches/skips are reported with deleteMany not called.

iteration.evidence: AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORT agent://18-SlopCleanupRerun / stage-18-architect.md status CLEAR with blocking_findings: [] and advisory_findings: []. Prior blockers were fixed: typed-only import route, removed deterministic Naver URL parser/fallback tests, executable optional live Naver smoke gate, bounded worker response, required redirect_chain, final URL validation, and real-app Playwright evidence. Full verification reran cleanly after fixes: npm run lint, npm run typecheck, npm test, npm run test:e2e, npm run build, git diff --check.
